title: SimpleEyeLine
description: Revert the arrow eyeline to a straight line in 1.21.11+
body:
# What?
In 1.21.11+, Mojang changed the original entity eyeline line render into a huge, ugly blue arrow that blocks the view. 
**This is not good.** 
**We don’t like it.**
We prefer a simple line, not a flashy arrow.

> Special thanks to daylighe_L for his debugging work and helpful contributions.
